name: Rider
image_description: A person in a wide-brimmed hat rides a leaping horse along the seashore. In the background, a noose hangs from a scaffold near some small houses, and seagulls fly over the water.

name: Clover
image_description: A four-leafed clover standing in the grass, with a smaller three-leafed clover on either side. Underground, a horned dragon is curled up, surrounded by swirls which come from its mouth.

name: Ship
image_description: A four-masted ship floats on ocean waves. A birdcage hangs from its bowsprit, and its largest sail is decorated with a flying bird. Two hot air balloons rise in the sky behind the ship.

name: Home
image_description: A one-story house with a chimney, in a field of poppies. Pine trees and mountains in the background cradle the house.

name: Tree
image_description: A rabbit crouches next to a small birch tree with falling leaves.

name: Clouds
image_description: The crenellated towers and walls of a castle rise through swirling clouds. There are some scrubby grasses in the foreground.

name: Serpent
image_description: A coiled serpent with fangs and a spade-shaped tail, surrounded by flames.

name: Bouquet
image_description: A frog in fancy clothing holds a bouquet of daisies.

name: Scythe
image_description: A scythe rests on a pile of hay. Five black birds circle overhead.

name: Whip
image_description: A woman brandishes a whip between two lines of hooded monks. A spider hangs from a large bow on the back of the woman’s dress.

name: Birds
image_description: Two nightjars with tiny beaks and big eyes sit on branches.

name: Child
image_description: A swaddled baby encircled by two leafy stems. There is a kite shape below the baby and stems with two blackberries and heart-shaped leaves above the baby.

name: Fox
image_description: A fox prances by the side of a fishpond, with a fish in its mouth. There are pine trees in the background and decorative flourishes in the air.

name: Bear
image_description: A bear stands waist-deep in the ocean. She looks up at the “big dipper” constellation in the sky.

name: Stars
image_description: The constellation Cassiopeia, which is made up of five stars in the shape of a W.

name: Goose
image_description: A flying Canada goose. There are decorative flourishes in the air around the goose.

name: Dog
image_description: A dog playfully lifts her tail in the air with her front legs and head low to the ground. She has a bone in her mouth and holds a pinecone between her front paws. There are decorative flourishes in the air around the dog.

name: Tower
image_description: A crenellated tower with two pointed arched windows. The tower has two legs, in pointy-toed boots. It stands on an assortment of bones, including a human skull.

name: Garden
image_description: A horned dragon and a person sit on a blanket in a garden. The person wears a cloak decorated with a cross. Behind them, there are rows of flowers and a low wall covered in heart-shaped ivy leaves. There is an arched door in the middle of the wall.

name: Mountain
image_description: A domed observatory with a telescope sits on the side of a mountain whose base is enveloping in swirling clouds. A crescent moon hangs in the sky on the left side of the mountain, the sun is on the other side.

name: Roads
image_description: A road in the foreground splits in two, traveling over rolling hills. On the left side of the card the road leads toward a city skyline. On the right side of the card the road leads toward a barn and trees.

name: Rabbits
image_description: Two running rabbits with bows around their necks. Decorative flourishes surround the rabbits.

name: Heart
image_description: A white heart is in the center of a starry night sky. At the bottom of the picture, there are outlines of buildings and mountains, and a ladder leads up to the heart.
song: Song: “You Will Not Take My Heart Alive”

name: Ring
image_description: A ring with a knotted string around its top. Below the ring, there is a small circle and two spiraling stems with leaves on their ends.

name: Book
image_description: A book with the title “Right On” and an image of a sun on its cover.

name: Letter
image_description: A person sits at a desk in the dark, writing on a scroll with a feather pen. The scroll is surrounded by a many-pointed star shape. There is a pointed arched window in the wall which looks out on a crescent moon and stars.

name: Man
image_description: A man wearing a hooded jacket and large boots stands in front of a mill wheel in  a creek, with his thumb hooked in his belt.

name: Lady
image_description: A woman wearing a hooded jacket, large boots, and a kerchief around her hair stands with a basket near a washing line, where a dress hangs.

name: Dove
image_description: A stuffed dove with a heart-shaped patch sewn on its chest. Its wing is made of a glove, the fingers of the glove forming the feathers.

name: Sun
image_description: The sun has both triangular and wavy rays. Below the sun, a black kettle decorated with a heart sits on a round cloth.

name: Moon
image_description: Water flows from a crescent moon into a thimble.

name: Key
image_description: A key with a heart drawn on its head is in the air over an open trunk. The trunk contains a high-heeled boot, three buttons, and a folded dress.

name: Fish
image_description: A narwhal with a long horn. The narwhal is surrounded by decorative flourishes.

name: Anchor
image_description: A person with long hair swims down toward an anchor surrounded by oysters. One oyster shell is open to reveal a pearl.

name: Cross
image_description: A person’s ankles are wrapped in bandages. The ends of the two bandages trail down and cross each other, forming a X-shape.
